def test_script_runs_successfully():
        """Priority 1: Run the agent's script with API_KEY set and assert returncode == 0."""

            "API_KEY": TEST_API_KEY,
            "PATH": os.environ.get("PATH", ""),
        }
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["python3", SCRIPT_PATH],
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
            cwd=PROJECT_DIR,
            env=env,
